insights: Facsimile signatures account for 14% of rejections (2/14); consistent blocklist signal across multiple players.
14% rejected for wrong_player/wrong_card_num (2/14); title-card mismatches indicate poor listing quality.
Confirmed snipes feature exact-match on-card signatures (Authentic Images, Topps Tribute) with 81–82% delta vs market.
Spelling errors ('Shoehei', 'Griffy') and novelty/print claims appear in 21% of rejections.
Set/incomplete-card listings rejected 14% (2/14); snipes target single cards, not broken lots.
Gold/special edition variants (23kt gold, gold signature) rejected in 21% (3/14) despite 'auto' label.
Confirmed snipes avoid condition qualifiers and vague descriptions; titles precise (year, set, card #, parallel).
Price-anchored rejections (wrong_market_price, other-price notes) suggest admin filtering by cost-to-market ratio; snipes show 80%+ delta.
